basic_details.job_title: RCB Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) has released the official Project Associate II Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with M.Sc. in Life Sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent, minimum 60% marks, and two years of R&D experience with a maximum age limit of 34 years as on 31-07-2026 can apply online before 24-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Associate II is 34 years as on 31.07.2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent, minimum 60% marks, and two years' experience in R&D.
qualification.details: Project Associate II: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared. Minimum 60% marks in Masters or equivalent degree. Two years' experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

salary_details.details: Project Associate II: Rs. 42,000/- + 27%HRA per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project Associate II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RCB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RCB Project Associate II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RCB Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RCB Project Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Associate II position at RCB is July 24, 2026, by 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or an equivalent qualification, along with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have at least two years of experience in Research and Development (R&D) in industrial, academic, or science and technology organizations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate II role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 34 years as of July 31, 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate II position announced under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an online interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. In which city is the Regional Centre for Biotechnology located?
faq.answer: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Project Associate II role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include experience in gene cloning, protein purification, ribosome purification, cryo-electron microscopy, good communication skills, and a strong motivation for research.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the RCB Project Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply online through the official website or the provided application link before the deadline of July 24, 2026.
